description: A lounging beach-sunbathing mechanical mouse scene pet with white sunglasses, a pink-and-cream parasol, a quilted pink mat, and no visible tail.

idle.notes: Calm reclined sunbathing loop with tiny breathing and parasol sway.

walk.notes: Not true walking. These are left-right scene-slide rows where the whole lounging setup glides while Sunny stays reclined.

curious.notes: Small head lift and sunglasses-angle change while Sunny keeps lounging.

happy.notes: Gentle contented wiggle and relaxed paw lift without breaking the lounging pose.

sleep.notes: Deeper nap-like recline with softer posture and tiny parasol sway.

probe.notes: Extra active-lounging adjustment row with tiny shoulder shimmy and mat settle.

float.notes: Tiny buoyant stretch while Sunny remains on the mat.

melancholy.notes: Gentle over-sunned droop and recovery loop.

walk_right.notes: Scene glides right while Sunny remains reclined on the mat.

walk_left.notes: Scene glides left while Sunny remains reclined on the mat.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing scene-slide rows rather than a standing walk cycle.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk-left and walk-right are not swapped
left-facing row keeps the mouse, mat, and parasol directionally unified
right-facing row keeps the mouse, mat, and parasol directionally unified
Sunny stays reclined and does not stand up during drag-facing rows
sunglasses, parasol, and mat remain present in all directional rows
